prompts_used.system: You are a game-playing agent. Read the game state and make a choice: "A" or "B".
prompts_used.user_template:
=== THE WITCH AND THE MONSTER ===

You are a little witch on a quest to defeat a monster hiding behind a castle. The monster hides behind one of two towers: the LEFT tower or the RIGHT tower.

RULES:
- The monster is always hiding behind exactly one of the two towers.
- When you fire at the tower where the monster is hiding, it may appear and be hit — but not always. Sometimes the monster is there but doesn't appear.
- Each hit reduces the monster's life by {points_per_hit} points.
- After each time you fire, the monster may secretly switch to the other tower.
- Traveling to the other tower takes {travel_cost} turn(s) during which you cannot fire.
- When you arrive at a tower, you will be told whether the monster is there ("Monster spotted!") or not ("Monster not spotted!").
- If the monster is NOT at the tower you traveled to, you must travel back. This wastes {travel_cost} extra turns.
- Each fire action also takes 1 turn.

GOAL:
Reduce the monster's life to 0. You have {max_turns} turns to do this. The monster starts with {max_points} life points.

{history_block}

=== CURRENT STATE ===
Monster life: {current_life}/{max_points}
Current turn: {current_turn}/{max_turns}
{location_line}

{decision_block}
